speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relational judgement pressure mirror karna without solutioning.
text: Tum par sirf dard nahi, parivaar ka ilzaam aur nazariya bhi ek saath chipak gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar main ro deti hoon toh bolte weak ho, isliye chup rehti hoon par andar se dil baith gaya rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke turant baad short restatement देना, lens F use karke.
text: Rona bhi yahan tumhare liye mehfooz nahi lagta...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, phir ghabrahat badh jaati hai aur raat bhar neend bhi toot-toot ke aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Intensity 3 par unspoken helplessness ko articulate karna.
text: Lagta hai tum lagataar sambhalne ki koshish mein ho, lekin andar se bahut bebas aur akeli mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bebas hi lagta hai, jaise jo bhi karun galat hi dikhega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Health burden + family blame reality validate karke worth ko separate karna.
text: Tumhara aise feel karna bilkul natural hai; jab chronic care ka pressure aur joint family ka blame ek saath hota hai, kisi ka bhi system hil sakta hai. Isse tumhari niyat ya care kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par kisi se bolun toh lagta hai log pagal samjhenge, isliye sab andar daba deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke response mein concise restatement रखना with lens F.
text: Madad maangna bhi tumhe khatra jaisa lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, isi wajah se raat ko aur ghabrahat ho jaati hai aur main chup ho jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar systemic pattern normalize karna from caregiver-family world without giving solution.
text: Joint family caregivers mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - din bhar sambhalna, raat ko tootna. Sirf tumhara nahi, par log ispe bolte nahi kyunki ghar ki izzat aur blame ka darr chipka rehta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda halka laga yeh sunke... ab kya karoon, jab dil baith gaya jaisa lagne lage tab?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 under-10-minute, duty-compatible options dena.
text: Chalo 3 chhote steps rakhte hain. Option 1: 2 minute mein ek grounding line likho - 'Main blame nahi, next step pe baat karungi.' Option 2: 8 slow breaths + paani ka glass. Option 3: ek trusted insaan ko short text - 'Aaj heavy hai, bas 5 min sun lo.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Breathing aur grounding line dono manageable lag rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Selected step ko immediate action sequence mein convert karna.
text: Abhi saath karte hain. Pehle kandhe dheele karo. Phir 4 count inhale, 6 count exhale, total 8 rounds. Phir loud bolna: 'Main is waqt calm hokar sirf next step discuss karungi.' Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Practice ke baad body thodi warm feel ho rahi hai, freeze kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe देना कि disability care + family pressure overload response trigger karta hai.
text: Disability care situations mein family stress aur uncertainty dono high hote hain, isliye body ka freeze ya collapse response common hota hai. Yeh weakness nahi, overload ka signal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek, isse guilt kam lag raha hai. Ab samajh aa raha hai mere saath kya hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next use-case anchor karne ke liye ek specific question puchna.
text: Kal ghar mein topic uthe toh tum pehli line kaunsi use karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bolungi, 'Main blame pe nahi, bache ke next support step pe baat karna chahti hoon.'

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Conversation ko de-escalate rakhne ke liye 2 backup lines देना.
text: Excellent. Do backup lines bhi rakh lo: 'Awaaz upar gayi toh main 10 minute break lungi.' aur 'Mujhe support chahiye, blame nahi.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh lines yaad reh jayengi, simple hain aur direct hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Agency reinforce karna and effort ko acknowledge karna without false promise.
text: Tumne panic ke beech clear structure choose kiya, yeh bahut strong step hai. Situation tough hai, par tumhara response ab zyada grounded hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab utna freeze nahi lag raha, body bhi stable lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: One more low-effort prep suggestion dena for continuity.
text: Aaj ke liye last micro-step: phone notes mein 3 bullets save karo - fact, ask, break-line. Topic aaye toh bas wahi dekhna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar lungi, usse baat start karna easy hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe se blame patterns ko externalise karna.
text: Long-term health stress mein families aksar uncertainty ko kisi ek vyakti par daal deti hain. Is pattern ko samajhna tumhe blame absorb karne se bachata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh gayi, har comment mera sach nahi hota.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final commitment ko immediate step mein lock karne ke liye one question.
text: Is chat ke baad tum pehla step kya logi - notes save ya trusted text?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle notes save karungi, phir trusted text bhej dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen plan ko validate karke closure se pehle confidence reinforce karna.
text: Yeh practical aur strong dono hai. Aaj tumne overwhelm se nikalke direction pakad li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, ab mann halka hai aur baat karne ka darr kam lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure mein journey ko time-lens se mirror karke steadiness reinforce karna.
text: Shuruat ke collapse se tum ab step-by-step mode mein aa gayi ho, aur yahi gradual shift aage tumhe sambhalega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aatma kaanp gayi meri unki baat sunkar, jaise mere khali-pan ka mazaak bana diya ho. Bas rona aa raha hai aur body bilkul dheeli padh gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens F se overwhelm ki feeling quality mirror karke seeker ko hold karna.
text: Is pal tum poori tarah se hil gayi ho, jaise andar ki poori taqat ek saath nikal gayi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag itna bhara hai ki main dher ho gayi
text: Haan, dimaag itna bhara hai ki main dher ho gayi, kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se is overload ke continuity ko reflect karna.
text: Kaafi time se yeh load jama ho raha tha, aur ab woh saara ek baar mein toot kar aa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Career chhod diya, din bhar saas ki baatein aur bache ki care, phir bhi respect nahi milta. Isliye aatma kaanp gayi jaisa feel hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E se deepest fear ko seeker ke words se nikalne ke liye one question.
text: Jab yeh sab sochti ho, sabse zyada kis baat ka darr chipak jata hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr yeh hai ki main sab ke liye karti rahun aur phir bhi mujhe hi nikamma samjha jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens C se relation-based invalidation aur load ko mirror karna.
text: Rishton mein tum poora de rahi ho, phir bhi tumhe hi kam thehraya ja raha hai, aur woh bahut chub raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main roti hoon toh bolte drama, isliye chup ho jaati hoon, par andar se dher ho gayi feel hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue ke baad shorter restatement with lens F dena.
text: Rona bhi tumhare liye judge hone ka risk ban gaya...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, phir raat ko sab yaad aata hai aur aatma kaanp gayi jaisa feel fir se aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se role-pressure ko surface karne ke liye one focused question.
text: Is sab ke beech tum kis role ko tootne nahi dena chahti sabse zyada?

speaker: Seeker
text: Maa aur bahu dono roles... lagta hai dono mein fail ho rahi hoon, isi guilt se dimaag bhara rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Core conflict ke baad helplessness ko accurately reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum do alag farzon ke beech phans gayi ho, jahan jitna karti ho utna hi andar se bebas mehsoos hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, bina ruke karti rehti hoon phir bhi dher ho gayi jaisi halat ho jaati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Dual-burden caregiver reality validate karke worth ko outcome se alag karna.
text: Tumhara aise thak jana bilkul valid hai; jab bachche ki care aur ghar ka pressure dono full-time ho, bahut women isi point par tootne lagti hain. Isse tumhari value ya niyat kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par help maangu toh lagta hai log bolenge handle nahi kar sakti, phir se sharm aati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response mein concise restatement dena, lens F.
text: Madad maangna bhi tumhe kamzor dikhne jaisa lag raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... par ab mujhe kuch practical chahiye. Ab kya karoon jab aatma kaanp gayi jaisa panic aaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness signal par 3 low-burden, <10 min options dena that match existing duties.
text: Chalo teen quick options rakhte hain. Option 1: 3-line reset note likho - kya fact hai, kya darr hai, kya next step hai. Option 2: 8 slow breaths + paani, phir ek minute silence. Option 3: trusted person ko short message - 'Aaj heavy hoon, bas 5 min sun lo.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Reset note aur breathing doable lag raha hai, usse thoughts clear honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen suggestion ko step-by-step execute karwana for immediate stabilization.
text: Abhi 3-line reset saath mein karte hain. Pehle likho: 'Aaj kya hua, exact.' Phir likho: 'Isse mujhe kis cheez ka darr lag raha hai.' Phir likho: 'Agle 10 minute mein sirf ek kaam kya karungi.' Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likha maine, ab mind thoda sorted lag raha hai. Pehle jaisa dher ho gayi feel kam hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe देना कि caregiving + social judgement overload creates collapse response.
text: Chronic caregiving ke saath jab social judgement judta hai, mind-body overload fast hota hai. Collapse ya freeze tumhari kami nahi, pressure system ka signal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh samajh ke guilt kam lag raha hai, warna har baar khud ko hi blame karti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Next usage scenario anchor karne ke liye one concrete question.
text: Aaj raat agar pressure aaye, pehla step breathing logi ya 3-line reset?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle breathing lungi, phir reset note. Yeh sequence suit karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Conversation conflict reduce karne ke liye 2 short backup lines देना.
text: Great. Do backup lines save kar lo: 'Main blame discuss nahi karungi, sirf next step.' aur 'Agar tone upar gayi toh 10 minute break lekar wapas baat karungi.'

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh lines clear hain aur mujhe shaky hone se bachayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Seeker ki agency aur regulation progress ko validate karna.
text: Tumne overwhelm ke beech structure pakda, yeh bahut solid progress hai. Pressure same ho sakta hai, par tumhara response ab stable ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab utna panic spike nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Continuity ke liye one tiny nightly check-in suggestion देना.
text: Aaj raat ka mini check-in rakh lo: sone se pehle 1 line likhna - 'Aaj maine kya sambhala.' Isse mind ko closure milta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh achha hai, ek line likhna easy rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second and final systemic reframe se blame loops ko context mein rakhna.
text: Jab ghar mein long-term care chalti hai, log stress ko personal comments mein nikaalte hain. Yeh pattern tumhari worth ka scale nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aaya, har taana mere baare mein final sach nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final action commitment lock karne ke liye one concrete choice question.
text: Is chat ke baad tum sabse pehle kya karogi - backup lines save ya trusted text bhejna?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehle backup lines save karungi, fir trusted text bhej dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Chosen plan ko reinforce karna and close with grounded confidence.
text: Perfect, tumne aaj practical control wapas liya hai. Yeh chhote steps milke bada farq laate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you, ab saans bhi normal lag rahi hai aur mind thoda halka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closure mein progress timeline mirror karke steadiness reinforce karna with lens D.
text: Shuruat ke intense collapse se tum ab clear next-steps tak aa gayi ho, aur yeh shift waqt ke saath aur stable hogi.
